title: carex stricta subsp. subrotunda
intro: Carex stricta subsp. subrotunda is a subspecies of sedge, a type of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. It is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Carex stricta subsp. subrotunda include its ability to aid in the healing of cuts and scrapes, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, Carex stricta subsp. subrotunda has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
